title: Evidence Pack Manifest
description: Schema for $RND_DIR/evidence/T<id>/manifest.json. Reasoning-free by construction: free-form text fields are disallowed via additionalProperties:false. The `x-disallowed-fields` extension below is the load-bearing list — evidence-pack-gate.sh sources it at runtime so this file is the single source of truth.

task_id.description: Optional task identifier the manifest belongs to (e.g., T1, T2).

command_argv.description: Argv vector of the executed command, including the tool name and all flags.

cwd.description: Absolute working directory at execution time.

exit_code.description: Exit code propagated from the wrapped command.

stdout_path.description: Path (relative to manifest dir or absolute) to captured stdout.

stderr_path.description: Path (relative to manifest dir or absolute) to captured stderr.

structured_path.description: Optional path to the structured-output artifact (e.g., pytest --json-report file).

inputs.description: Files the tool could plausibly have read; each has path + sha256 for stale-detection.

sections.description: Optional named-section index into stdout for tools without structured-output mode.
